# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Search products by name, category, and price range.
     *
     * @param  \Illuminate\Http\Request  $request
     * @return \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
     */
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'name'         => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category'     => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category_id'  => 'nullable|integer|exists:categories,id',
            'min_price'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by'      => 'nullable|in:name,price,created_at,relevance',
            'sort_order'   => 'nullable|in:asc,desc',
            'per_page'     => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100',
        ]);

        $name       = $validated['name'] ?? null;
        $category   = $validated['category'] ?? null;
        $categoryId = $validated['category_id'] ?? null;
        $minPrice   = $validated['min_price'] ?? null;
        $maxPrice   = $validated['max_price'] ?? null;
        $sortBy     = $validated['sort_by'] ?? 'relevance';
        $sortOrder  = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 'desc';
        $perPage    = $validated['per_page'] ?? 20;

        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];
        $selectFields = [
            'p.id',
            'p.name',
            'p.description',
            'p.price',
            'p.sku',
            'p.stock_quantity',
            'p.image_url',
            'p.created_at',
            'c.name AS category_name',
            'c.id AS category_id',
        ];

        // Build a relevance score when searching by name for better ranking
        if ($name) {
            $selectFields[] = DB::raw("
                (
                    CASE
                        WHEN LOWER(p.name) = LOWER(?) THEN 100
                        WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?) THEN 75
                        WHEN LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?) THEN 50
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                    +
                    CASE
                        WHEN LOWER(p.description) LIKE LOWER(?) THEN 25
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                ) AS relevance_score
            ");

            // Bindings for the relevance score CASE expressions
            $bindings[] = $name;                   // exact match
            $bindings[] = $name . '%';             // starts with
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';       // contains in name
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';       // contains in description

            // Filter: must match name or description
            $conditions[] = '(LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(?) OR LOWER(p.description) LIKE LOWER(?))';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $name . '%';
        } else {
            $selectFields[] = DB::raw('0 AS relevance_score');
        }

        // Category filter (by name with partial match or by ID)
        if ($categoryId) {
            $conditions[] = 'c.id = ?';
            $bindings[] = $categoryId;
        } elseif ($category) {
            $conditions[] = 'LOWER(c.name) LIKE LOWER(?)';
            $bindings[] = '%' . $category . '%';
        }

        // Price range filters
        if ($minPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price >= ?';
            $bindings[] = $minPrice;
        }

        if ($maxPrice !== null) {
            $conditions[] = 'p.price <= ?';
            $bindings[] = $maxPrice;
        }

        // Only active/visible products
        $conditions[] = 'p.is_active = 1';

        $whereClause = count($conditions) > 0
            ? 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions)
            : '';

        // Determine ORDER BY clause
        $orderClause = match ($sortBy) {
            'name'       => 'ORDER BY p.name ' . $sortOrder,
            'price'      => 'ORDER BY p.price ' . $sortOrder,
            'created_at' => 'ORDER BY p.created_at ' . $sortOrder,
            'relevance'  => $name
                ? 'ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, p.name ASC'
                : 'ORDER BY p.created_at DESC',
            default      => 'ORDER BY p.created_at DESC',
        };

        $selectFieldsStr = implode(', ', array_map(function ($field) {
            return $field instanceof \Illuminate\Database\Query\Expression
                ? $field->getValue(DB::connection()->getQueryGrammar())
                : $field;
        }, $selectFields));

        $sql = "
            SELECT {$selectFieldsStr}
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
            {$whereClause}
            {$orderClause}
        ";

        // Use a raw query wrapped in a paginator for performance
        // First, get total count
        $countSql = "
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
            {$whereClause}
        ";

        // We need separate bindings for count (only WHERE bindings, not SELECT bindings)
        $whereBindings = [];
        $selectBindingCount = $name ? 4 : 0; // number of bindings used in SELECT
        $whereBindings = array_slice($bindings, $selectBindingCount);

        $totalResult = DB::selectOne($countSql, $whereBindings);
        $total = $totalResult->total ?? 0;

        // Paginate
        $page = max(1, (int) $request->input('page', 1));
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        $paginatedSql = $sql . " LIMIT ? OFFSET ?";
        $allBindings = array_merge($bindings, [$perPage, $offset]);

        $results = DB::select($paginatedSql, $allBindings);

        // Build paginated response
        $lastPage = (int) ceil($total / $perPage);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => [
                'products'     => $results,
                'pagination'   => [
                    'total'        => $total,
                    'per_page'     => $perPage,
                    'current_page' => $page,
                    'last_page'    => $lastPage,
                    'from'         => $total > 0 ? $offset + 1 : null,
                    'to'           => $total > 0 ? min($offset + $perPage, $total) : null,
                ],
                'filters_applied' => array_filter([
                    'name'        => $name,
                    'category'    => $category,
                    'category_id' => $categoryId,
                    'min_price'   => $minPrice,
                    'max_price'   => $maxPrice,
                    'sort_by'     => $sortBy,
                    'sort_order'  => $sortOrder,
                ], fn($v) => $v !== null),
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
